# STARTER_TEXT_HUMANIZATION_REVISION

Use this starter for **Text Humanization Revision**.

## Load order
- `dist/DEPLOY_LITE.md`
- `dist/runtime/route_cards/rt_text_humanization.md`
- `dist/runtime/contracts_lite/text_humanization_revision.md`
- `dist/runtime/skills/text-humanization-expert.md`
- `dist/runtime/skills/content-and-case-study-expert.md`
- optional: `dist/runtime/skills/brand-strategy-expert.md`
- `dist/SESSION_ZERO.md`

## Best for
- Use when the governing need is prose-quality revision rather than structural rewriting or route-level diagnosis.

## Estimated footprint
- Approximate startup size with governing skills: ~1953 words / ~2597 tokens

## Escalate instead to
- `dist/DEPLOY_BRAND.md` when the task widens inside one domain
- `dist/DESIGNPILOT_DEPLOY.md` when multiple domains or proof-sensitive conflicts are central

## Suggested kickoff prompt
I am starting a lightweight DesignPilot session for Text Humanization Revision. Use the loaded lite bootstrap, this route, and this contract. Ask only for the missing context that would materially change routing or output quality.
